chunks.text: Chenming Hu honored by President Barack Obama at the White House - EECS at Berkeley Prof. Emeritus Chenming Hu was honored in May 2016 by President Barack Obama with the National Medal of Technology and Innovation. Prof. Hu and Chemistry Prof. Paul Alivisatos, who was honored with the National Medal of Science, received their medals from the president at a ceremony in the East Room of the White House. Categories Faculty Honors View Open Faculty Positions
